title: validationResult
description: Object containing information about bulk import state.

importState.description:
Current state of the import. The possible values are:
- `Uploaded`: The file was successfully uploaded.
- `InValidation`: File validation is in progress.
- `ReadyToImport`: File validation completed, ready for import.
- `Completed`: File successfully imported.
- `ValidationFailed`: File validation failed.
- `CompletedWithError`: File import failed.

lastUpdateDate.description: Date and time of the last update of the import, in `yyyy-mm-ddTHH:MM:SS+00:00` format.

fileName.description: Name of the file being imported.

validationResult.description: Information about the result of bulk imported data validation.

isValid.description: Indicates whether the bulk import operation was successful.

validationResult.description: Detailed information about the validation results.

name.description: Unique identifier associated with the imported item.

validRows.description: Total number of lines successfully validated.

invalidRows.description: Number of imported lines that failed validation.
